/usr/bin/ar qc libnr_rlc.a CMakeFiles/nr_rlc.dir/asn1_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc.dir/nr_rlc_oai_api.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc.dir/nr_rlc_ue_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_entity.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_entity_am.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_entity_tm.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_entity_um.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_pdu.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_rlc_core.dir/nr_rlc_sdu.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnr_rlc.a
